reasoning: The control 3_14_7 focuses on identifying unauthorized use of organizational systems, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through audit logging to track access and actions, RBAC to enforce least privilege, and NetworkPolicies to control ingress traffic. Audit logging in Kubernetes can capture detailed information about API requests, which helps in identifying unauthorized access. RBAC ensures that users have only the permissions they need, reducing the risk of unauthorized actions. NetworkPolicies can restrict unauthorized network access to the cluster.
title: 3_14_7: 3.14.7 Identify unauthorized use of organizational systems
